'''''Tendo''''' was a [[MB-C1 medium transport]] in the service of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. The vessel was part of the [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Corrupter (Imperial-class)|''Corrupter'''s]] [[Corrupter repair convoy|resupply convoy]], which was lead by the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] [[Monitor (EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate)|''Monitor'']] to where the ''Corrupter'' lay damaged in the [[Mev system/Legends|Mev system]]. The ship, which bore a cargo of engineering [[Droid/Legends|droids]], was then attacked by [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] raiders and was destroyed along with the rest of the convoy.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
